Class UtilitiesFunction

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am25.server.model.Utilities.UtilitiesFunction
public final class UtilitiesFunction extends Object
Logging utilities for the Mesos server. All methods write timestamped entries to "server.log"; output is silently dropped if the log has not been initialised.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static int
    bindCorrectNumberOfBottomListCard(int playerNumber)
    Returns the number of bottom-list cards based on player count.

    Returns the number of top-list cards based on player count.

    Counts card occurrences by type into the destination counters list.

    Returns the prestige-point score for a given final position in a game with the specified player count.

    Initialises (or resets) the log file.

    Logs an error message using the default utility prefix.

    Logs an error message to console and log file.

    Logs an informational message to console and log file.

    this method generates a shuffled array of integer from y to x-1

    stringToIntegerBinder(String number)
    Converts a string representation of a player count ("2"–"5") to its integer value.

  • Method Details

    • initLog

      public static void initLog()
      Initialises (or resets) the log file. Call once at server startup. Every call truncates the previous content.

    • logInfo

      public static void logInfo(String prefix, String message)
      Logs an informational message to console and log file.
      Parameters:
      prefix - parameter prefix.
      message - parameter message.

    • logError

      public static void logError(String prefix, String message)
      Logs an error message to console and log file.
      Parameters:
      prefix - parameter prefix.
      message - parameter message.

    • logError

      public static void logError(String message)
      Logs an error message using the default utility prefix.
      Parameters:
      message - parameter message.

    • bindCorrectNumberOfTopListCard

      public static int bindCorrectNumberOfTopListCard(int playerNumber)
      Returns the number of top-list cards based on player count.
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - parameter playerNumber.
      Returns:
      the result of the operation.

    • bindCorrectNumberOfBottomListCard

      public static int bindCorrectNumberOfBottomListCard(int playerNumber)
      Returns the number of bottom-list cards based on player count.
      Parameters:
      playerNumber - parameter playerNumber.
      Returns:
      the result of the operation.

    • countOccurrence

      public static void countOccurrence(List<Card> listToParse, List<Integer> setCards)
      Counts card occurrences by type into the destination counters list.
      Parameters:
      listToParse - parameter listToParse.
      setCards - parameter setCards.

    • shuffledFromYToXExclusive

      public static ArrayList<Integer> shuffledFromYToXExclusive(int y, int x)
      this method generates a shuffled array of integer from y to x-1
      Parameters:
      y - lower bound
      x - upper bound
      Returns:
      list of integers

    • getScore

      public static int getScore(int playerCount, int position)
      Returns the prestige-point score for a given final position in a game with the specified player count.
      Parameters:
      playerCount - the number of players in the game (2–5).
      position - the final ranking position (1-based).
      Returns:
      the prestige-point score for that position.

    • stringToIntegerBinder

      public static int stringToIntegerBinder(String number) throws IllegalStateException
      Converts a string representation of a player count ("2"–"5") to its integer value.
      Parameters:
      number - the string to convert.
      Returns:
      the corresponding integer player count.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the string does not represent a valid player count.
